subject: Bahasa Inggris
curriculumNote: Draft orisinal berbasis kompetensi umum Kurikulum Merdeka; cocokkan kembali dengan ATP dan materi yang telah diajarkan di cabang.

questions.indicator: Identifying the main idea of a short text
questions.question:
Read the text "Recycling Project". Our class started a recycling project last month. Students separate paper, plastic, and metal into different bins. The collected materials are sent to a recycling center every Friday, reducing waste around the school.
What is the main idea of the text?

options.A: A class recycling project reduces school waste
options.B: A list of objects owned by the students
options.C: A problem that has no solution
options.D: An invitation to cancel an activity

questions.explanation: The entire paragraph focuses on a class recycling project reduces school waste.

questions.question: According to the text, when does the activity happen?
questions.explanation: The text explicitly states: every Friday.

questions.question: The word "separate" is closest in meaning to ...

options.A: a place that cannot be entered
options.B: an action done without a reason

questions.explanation: In the paragraph, "separate" means put into different groups.

questions.question: In the sentence "They helps achieve the goal," the reference is most closely related to ...
questions.explanation: The reference points back to the students.

questions.indicator: Using the correct verb form for a habitual action
questions.question: Each student ... the plan carefully every week.
questions.explanation: A singular subject in a habitual action takes the simple-present form "reviews".

questions.indicator: Using the correct verb for a completed event
questions.question: Last week, the group ... a similar activity.
questions.explanation: "Last week" signals the simple past, so the correct verb is "conducted".

questions.question: Notice: "Please complete the activity log before leaving." What should participants do?

options.B: Wait until next month to read it
options.C: Fill in the log before they leave

questions.explanation: The notice asks participants to complete the log before leaving.

questions.indicator: Drawing a logical inference from a text
questions.question: Why is the action in the text useful?

options.A: because it makes the activity impossible
options.B: to reduce waste around the school
options.D: because it prevents anyone from learning

questions.explanation: The benefit can be inferred from the stated purpose: to reduce waste around the school.

questions.question: The writer's main purpose is to ...

options.A: inform readers about an activity and its benefit

questions.explanation: The paragraph informs readers about the activity and explains its benefit.

questions.indicator: Selecting an appropriate response in a discussion
questions.question: A friend says, "We will present our findings tomorrow." What is the best response?

options.A: I never listen to any findings.
options.D: Great. Let's check the evidence once more.

questions.explanation: "Great. Let's check the evidence once more" is relevant, polite, and supports preparation.
